message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction

title «Codeset»
subgraph CodeSet
    title Algorithm18Code
    subgraph Codes
        actor "E" as Actor
        subgraph CodeList
            item "UKPT" : UKPT
            item "E3DC" : DES112CBC
            item "EA2C" : AES128CBC
            item "DKP9" : DUKPT2009
            item "UKA1" : UKPTwithAES128
            item "EA5C" : AES256CBC
            item "EA9C" : AES192CBC
            item "DA12" : AESDUKPT128ECB
            item "DA25" : AESDUKPT256ECB
            item "DA19" : AESDUKPT192ECB
            item "N108" : Nist800-108KeyDerivation
            item "EA2R" : AES128CTR
            item "EA9R" : AES192CTR
            item "EA5R" : AES256CTR
            item "E3DR" : DES112CTR
            item "E36C" : DES168CBC
            item "E36R" : DES168CTR
            item "SD5C" : SDE056CBC
        end subgraph
    end subgraph
end subgraph

Actor -- CodeList : <<Includes>>

@enduml
